channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Building Real Apps with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#: End-to-End Patterns and Architecture
item.description: Building real apps with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#: master app architecture patterns, CLI tools, ASP.NET Core APIs, and console agents in .NET. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/03/building-real-apps-with-github-copilot-sdk-in-c-endtoend-patterns-and-architecture

item.title: Prototype Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Prototype design pattern in C#: complete guide with code examples, implementation, and best practices for object cloning and creational design patterns. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/03/prototype-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: Getting Started with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#: Installation, Setup, and First Conversation
item.description: Getting started with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#: master installation, CopilotClient setup, streaming responses, and build your first .NET AI app. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/02/getting-started-with-github-copilot-sdk-in-c-installation-setup-and-first-conversation

item.title: Strategy Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Strategy design pattern in C#: complete guide with code examples, implementation, and best practices for flexible algorithm selection. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/02/strategy-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: Hiring When You Aren't the Expert - Dev Leader Weekly 129
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss how to approach hiring for roles you don't have expertise in -- and why the real question isn't "how do I interview?" but "what problem am I solving?" Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/02/hiring-when-you-arent-the-expert-dev-leader-weekly-129

item.title: RAG with Semantic Kernel in C#: Complete Guide to Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Master RAG with Semantic Kernel in C# using vector stores, embeddings, and InMemoryVectorStore. Complete guide with working .NET code examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/01/rag-with-semantic-kernel-in-c-complete-guide-to-retrievalaugmented-generation

item.title: When to Use Factory Method Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: When to use Factory Method pattern in C#: decision criteria, code examples, and scenarios to determine if Factory Method is the right choice. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/01/when-to-use-factory-method-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: Weekly Recap: Microsoft Agent Framework, Semantic Kernel, and Builder Patterns in C# [Feb 2026]
item.description: This week covers the Microsoft Agent Framework in C# -- from core AIAgent abstractions to AgentSessions and function tools -- plus Semantic Kernel agents and plugins, Builder pattern deep dives, and GitHub Copilot SDK development. Also included: new videos on software engineering planning and hiring insights. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/01/weekly-recap-microsoft-agent-framework-semantic-kernel-and-builder-patterns-in-c-feb-2026

item.title: Semantic Kernel Agents in C#: Complete Guide to AI Agents
item.description: Master Semantic Kernel agents in C# with ChatCompletionAgent, AgentGroupChat orchestration, and Microsoft Agent Framework integration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/28/semantic-kernel-agents-in-c-complete-guide-to-ai-agents

item.title: Builder Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: See Builder pattern in action with a complete real-world C# example. Step-by-step implementation of a configuration system demonstrating step-by-step object construction. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/28/builder-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: Semantic Kernel Plugins in C#: The Complete Guide
item.description: Master Semantic Kernel plugins in C# with this guide. Learn to create native functions, prompt functions, and OpenAPI plugins with real code examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/27/semantic-kernel-plugins-in-c-the-complete-guide

item.title: Factory Method Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide
item.description: Master the Factory Method design pattern in C# with code examples, real-world scenarios, and practical guidance for flexible object creation. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/27/factory-method-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide

item.title: GitHub Copilot SDK for .NET: Complete Developer Guide
item.description: Learn the GitHub Copilot SDK for .NET in this complete developer guide. Build custom AI agents with CopilotClient, CopilotSession, streaming, tools, and multi-model support in C#. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/26/github-copilot-sdk-for-net-complete-developer-guide

item.title: Builder vs Fluent Interface Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Understand the differences between Builder and Fluent Interface patterns in C# with code examples, use cases, and guidance on when to use each pattern. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/26/builder-vs-fluent-interface-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: Semantic Kernel in C#: Complete AI Orchestration Guide
item.description: Master Semantic Kernel in C# with this complete guide. Learn plugins, agents, RAG, and vector stores to build production AI applications with .NET. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/25/semantic-kernel-in-c-complete-ai-orchestration-guide

item.title: Planning in Software Engineering: Lessons from Startup to Big Tech - Dev Leader Weekly 128
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss planning in software engineering -- why it looks different across environments, and why optimizing for agility beats optimizing for the perfect plan. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/25/planning-in-software-engineering-lessons-from-startup-to-big-tech-dev-leader-weekly-128

item.title: Builder Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master Builder pattern best practices in C#. Learn code organization strategies, interface design principles, dependency injection integration, and maintainability tips. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/02/24/builder-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability
